About Us

WHAT WE
BUILD

We're a startup studio building and scaling ventures across Southeast Asia. From AI assistants to talent platforms, we're creating the future one venture at a time — all currently under development.

HOW WE
WORK

We build, fund, and scale companies through a proven startup studio model. Our approach combines speed, capital, and deep operational expertise.
